## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual testing completed, if relevant

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, cookies, or tokens are committed.
- [ ] Logs and screenshots do not expose private tenant data or PHI.
- [ ] New configuration is documented in `.env.example`.
- [ ] Failure modes are handled or documented.

## Notes for reviewers

Add screenshots, traces, or implementation notes here.
